arts.ttl: Real Madrid to offer Man Utd transfer target in STUNNING Xabi Alonso swap
arts.sum: Although Guler is said to prefer a move to Italy if he is to leave Real, meaning negotiations are likely to drag on despite an acceptance that Alonso will eventually replace Ancelotti in Madrid this summer. Nico Paz is another player listed as a candidate to be offered to Leverkusen despite the youngster being owned by Como, with Real first needing to activate their own buy-back clause before then sending him to the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Joe Thompson's daughter pays heartbreaking tribute to former Man United footballer and says he was the 'greatest man' after his death aged 36
arts.sum: Thompson, who came through Manchester United's academy and spent much of his playing career at Rochdale, was diagnosed with cancer for the third time last year.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains reason for latest change after dropping another Man Utd star
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Altay Bayindir was handed a chance to impress against Newcastle last week but made a host of errors in a 4-1 defeat and he has now been excluded from the matchday squad to face Wolves

arts.ttl: Who is Harry Amass? Manchester United youngster given chance to impress vs Wolves
arts.sum: All the latest Manchester United news as Ruben Amorim gears up for a difficult end to the season

arts.ttl: Man United have agreement with “one of the best forwards in the world” regarding summer move
arts.sum: Manchester United are hoping to sign Victor Osimhen at the end of the season, and they have an agreement with the Nigerian striker regarding a summer move. The 26-year-old is currently on loan at Turkish club Galatasaray, and he has been outstanding for them. The Nigerian International has 29 goals to his name this season. arts.ttl: Xavi Simons sends transfer message to Man Utd
arts.sum: Xavi Simons has hinted that he will leave RB Leipzig during the 2025 summer transfer window amid significant interest from a number of top clubs across Europe. Simons is expected to leave RB Leipzig this summer and Duncan Castles revealed that a number of elite clubs are eager to sign him on the latest episode of The Transfers Podcast .

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer brings Ruben Amorim back down to earth with brutal Man Utd assessment
arts.sum: Alan Shearer is not convinced Manchester United can improve their Premier League form even with the momentum they might have from their Europa League progression

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd v Wolves today with game not on TV
arts.sum: Manchester United face Wolves in the Premier League on Sunday but the match is not on TV, with the Red Devils in action on Thursday night in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Why Luke Shaw is not in the Manchester United squad vs Wolves
arts.sum: Luke Shaw has not started for Man United in 14 months and is not in the squad against Wolverhampton Wanderers.
